label: 第178話
source_locator: 単行本20巻 目次 p.127
summary_short: 乙骨は「リカ」を完全顕現させ、術式の模倣と呪言を使用する。乙骨・烏鷺・石流はそれぞれ領域を展開し、三つ巴の領域勝負へ入る。
summary_full: 乙骨は指輪をはめ、リカを完全顕現させる。乙骨はリカとの接続中の五分間、リカが蓄えた呪力と呪具を利用し、模倣した術式を行使できる。乙骨は呪言で烏鷺の動きを止め、リカとの連携で攻める一方、リカは石流の呪力砲を受けて打ち合う。乙骨がドゥルヴの術式も模倣して烏鷺へ傷を負わせると、乙骨・烏鷺・石流の三人は同時に領域展開へ踏み切る。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 憂太 tried to avoid using 里香 but now he's been left without a choice. Forced to match 烏鷺亨子 and 石流龍 's incredible power, 憂太 shows what he's truly made of by asking 里香 to give him everything. Not only has 里香 remained with 憂太 even after Orimoto passed away, but their ability to fight together has also grown tremendously.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 憂太 goes all out and fully manifests 里香. 憂太 dons his ring and 里香 fully manifests as a 呪霊 right next to him. 龍 and 烏鷺 are both surprised and confused by this turn of events. 烏鷺 is shocked 憂太 wasn't using his full power and 龍 doesn't understand how 憂太's 呪力 is even filling back up. 里香 tears her chest open to display an arsenal of 呪具 kept in its body for 憂太 to choose from. 里香 the curse remained with 憂太 even after 折本里香 passed away as a part of her will to protect him. The 呪霊 is directly connected to 憂太's 術式 and is capable of storing 呪力 and 呪具 for him. While connected to 里香 through his ring, 憂太 can use his cursed techniques, receive a supply of 呪力, and fully manifest the 里香 to aid him in battle. He can maintain this sustained connection for up to five minutes. 憂太 and 里香 pummel 烏鷺. 里香 attaches a metal arm casing to 憂太 to improve his striking power. Ready to re-engage, 憂太 begins by having 里香 rush through the air toward 烏鷺, who prepares her sky manipulation technique in response. However, 憂太 suddenly creates the Snake Eyes & Fangs sigil of the 狗巻 clan on his mouth and activates cursed speech , commanding his opponent not to move. 烏鷺 tries to cover her ears but she's too late and is immediately immobilized. Unable to defend herself, 烏鷺 is pummeled by a barrage of strikes from both 憂太 and 里香. 憂太 launches himself off 里香's arms toward 烏鷺 to continue pressuring her after the cursed speech wears off. 龍 tries to intervene and launches a beam of 呪力, claiming 憂太's approach is too soft. 里香 blocks it with one hand, impressing 龍, who believes 里香 might be even more durable than 憂太 himself. Irritated by the pain, 里香 angrily punches 龍 in the face and sends him flying. She tries to follow up with another strike but 龍 quickly counters with an explosive punch of his own. Excited with the potential to satisfy his hunger, 龍 fixes his hair and claims he still has an appetite that calls for an extra large helping. 憂太 copying ドゥルヴ's 術式. Facing 烏鷺 one-on-one, 憂太 summons small flying 式神 by using strands of his hair as an intermediary. 烏鷺 destroys one of them with her technique and claims members of the Fujiwara only stand in her way because they fear her potential. She was the leader of the Sun, Moon, and Stars Squad affiliated directly with the Toh of the Fujiwara clan. They were assassins that pursued lives of selfless devotion in the shadows and didn't even bear names. A particular sorcerer of the Fujiwara clan gave 烏鷺亨子 her name only to execute her as a proxy to cover up his own crimes of killing someone else within the clan. "領域展開!" Suddenly, 烏鷺 is cut across her chest and hips by the 式神. The trajectories of the 式神 constitute a domain, which 烏鷺 recognizes as ドゥルヴ Lakdawalla 's technique. She realizes that 憂太 isn't a cursed speech user with the ability to summon 式神, he's a sorcerer with the ability to copy other cursed techniques. 憂太 knocks 烏鷺 down to where 龍 and 里香 are fighting and tries to capitalize with a straight punch. 烏鷺 manages to stop his punch and breaks his armored shell with the ice-breaker effect of her technique. Uninjured by the exchange, 憂太 tells 烏鷺 that regardless of what his ancestors may have done, living for herself with only get her so far. This only serves to further annoy 烏鷺, who claims that saying things like "live for others" is something only those who have achieved something can do. Their conversation is interrupted by a noticeable surge in 龍's 呪力. 龍 thinks his two opponents need to stop talking because words are pointless at this stage of the fight. Prepared to bring the three-way battle to its climax, the three sorcerers all activate 領域展開 at the same time!

candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 死滅回游 乙骨憂太 vs. 烏鷺亨子 vs. 石流龍 乙骨憂太 vs. 烏鷺亨子 vs. 石流龍
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 里香's Inventory Steel Arm Steel Arm 石流龍の術式 呪力放出 領域展開 烏鷺亨子の術式 Sky Manipulation (名称不明) 領域展開 乙骨憂太の術式 模倣／呪言／式神 (ドゥルヴ's 術式) 里香 領域展開 呪言／式神 (ドゥルヴ's 術式)

key_events_verified_phase9: 乙骨がリカを完全顕現させる
五分間の接続条件が説明される
乙骨が呪言と模倣術式を使用する
乙骨・烏鷺・石流が同時に領域展開する
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
